message:
feat(engine): lockstep runner TOML runtime specs + security_epoch test enrichment

Concurrent agent changes:

- franken_lockstep_runner.rs (+144): added TOML-based lockstep runtime
  specification support. New LockstepRuntimeSpecsFile/LockstepRuntimeSpec
  types with schema versioning (franken-engine.lockstep-runtimes.v1),
  runtime_id/display_name/version_pin/command/args/enabled fields, and
  auto-discovery from lockstep_runtimes.toml fixture path. Enables
  multi-runtime lockstep comparison without hardcoded engine lists.

- security_epoch.rs (+185): comprehensive test enrichment covering
  epoch lifecycle, transition validation, boundary conditions, and
  serde roundtrip coverage for security epoch management.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
